sp_instance.placeholder_template: {{options.advancedOptions.title}}
sp_instance.title: My Items

sys_update_version.name: sp_instance_79b1cdac9359c350945375dcebba10ff
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sp_instance"><sp_instance action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><advanced_placeholder_dimensions>true</advanced_placeholder_dimensions><async_load>true</async_load><async_load_device_type>desktop,mobile,tablet</async_load_device_type><async_load_trigger>viewport</async_load_trigger><class_name/><color>default</color><css>.my-items-container{
  margin-left:0px;
  margin-right:0px;
}</css><glyph/><id/><order>1</order><placeholder_dimensions>{
  "mobile": {
    "height": "100%",
    "width": "100%"
  },
  "desktop": {
    "height": "100%",
    "width": "100%"
  },
  "tablet": {
    "height": "100%",
    "width": "100%"
  }
}</placeholder_dimensions><placeholder_dimensions_script><![CDATA[function evaluateConfig(options) {
    return {
        "mobile": {
            "height": "100%",
            "width": "100%"
        },
        "desktop": {
            "height": "100%",
            "width": "100%"
        },
        "tablet": {
            "height": "100%",
            "width": "100%"
        },
        title: gs.getMessage("My active items")
    };
}]]></placeholder_dimensions_script><placeholder_template><div class="skeleton-loader-container my-items-skeleton skeleton-loading panel flex-column">
  <div class="panel-heading b-b">
    <h3 class="panel-title">
      {{options.advancedOptions.title}}
    </h3>
  </div>
  <div class="skeleton-loader-body panel-body">
    <div class="skeleton-item-half-width skeleton-item primary-activity-heading-loader"></div>
    <div ng-class="options.card_behaviour == 'single' ? 'single-view' : 'wrap-view'">
      <div class="skeleton-loading-card-container" ng-repeat="x in ([].constructor(options.list_view_count*1)) track by $index">
        <div class="skeleton-loading-card flex-column">
          <span class="skeleton-item-quarter-width skeleton-item item-badge-loader"></span>
          <span class="skeleton-item-full-width skeleton-item item-title-loader"></span>
          <span class="skeleton-item-half-width skeleton-item item-field-loader"></span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="summary-view-container">
      <div class="summary-view-grid-container" ng-repeat="item in [1,2,3,4,5,6]">
        <div>
          <div class="skeleton-item skeleton-item-half-width secondary-activity-loader"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div></placeholder_template><preserve_placeholder_size>false</preserve_placeholder_size><roles/><short_description/><size>md</size><sp_column display_value="1">f1b1cdac9359c350945375dcebba10ea</sp_column><sp_widget display_value="My Items">6e449453c33030105a09f0ad9840ddf0</sp_widget><sys_class_name>sp_instance</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-02 10:34:52</sys_created_on><sys_id>79b1cdac9359c350945375dcebba10ff</sys_id><sys_mod_count>3</sys_mod_count><sys_name>My Items</sys_name><sys_package display_value="msdportal" source="x_146833_msdportal">d5d7a83f93898b10945375dcebba1081</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="msdportal">d5d7a83f93898b10945375dcebba1081</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sp_instance_79b1cdac9359c350945375dcebba10ff</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-02 10:41:26</sys_updated_on><title>My Items</title><url/><widget_parameters/></sp_instance><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=79b1cdac9359c350945375dcebba10ff"/></record_update>
